question: What is the position of the horses in the image relative to each other? Select from the following options: (A) They are all grouped closely together. (B) They are all separate from each other. (C) They are in two separate groups. (D) They are in a line formation.
gold_answer: They are all grouped closely together
answer_choices: They are all grouped closely together
They are all separate from each other
They are in two separate groups
They are in a line formation

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: a single horse running far apart from the main group, creating distance
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: horses grouped closely together, forming a tight herd

inpaint_prompt_used: a single horse running far apart from the main group, creating distance
negative_prompt_used: horses grouped closely together, forming a tight herd
